headline: Feline Invasion
subtext: The local council has lost control of the cat population, resulting in an overwhelming number of felines roaming around residents' gardens. Ratepayers are demanding action from their council as the situation is becoming unbearable.
body:
DEPENDING ON THE TURMOIL IN THE NEIGHBOURHOOD, A FELINE INVASION COULD BE THE LAST STRAW FOR THE RESIDENTS OF NORTHERN BEACHES. IT'S ALMOST IMPOSSIBLE TO MISS THE CAT-ASTROPHE WHEN YOU SPEND TIME AT THE REMY DIGEST.

THE CRACKPOT THEORY SUGGESTS THAT THE FLOCK OF KITTY BIRDS DESCENDING ON THE AREA COULD BE DUE TO A SECRET, UNDERGROUND CAT-SOCIETY. "CR" SIMON WRIGHT, FROM THE REMY DIGEST, SAYS: "WE'RE TALKING ABOUT AN INVASION OF P

professor.title: From The Archives
professor.content: The archives are currently closed due to a flea infestation.

classifieds: Seaside Spa: Offers that are out of this world! Contact now.
Unwanted: Sibling with a sense of humor. Free to good home. Must love puns.
For Sale: Timeless beach sand hourglass. $1000

mystic.prediction: As The Mystic, I foresee a prosperous real estate market for Cancers this year, but beware of unexpected parking predicaments near popular coffee shops on the beach.
